title: Spearhead advised The Chill Brothers, a Forum Asset Management company, on its acquisition off Alternative Aire
description: The Chill Brother, a Forum Management Company, acquired Alternative Aire, a provider of heating, ventilation, and air conditioning (HVAC) services.

title: Spearhead advised Signal Hill Equity on its acquisition of ZMM
description: Signal Hill, a Toronto-based private equity firm specializing in architecture, engineering, and consulting services, acquired ZMM, an award-winning design firm with offices in West Virginia, Virginia, and Ohio.
articleTitle: Signal Hill Equity Partners Expands Architecture and Engineering Services Platform Focused on Serving Social Infrastructure End Markets

title: Spearhead advised Collective Waste Solutions on its acquisition of Fin-Wall Site Services
description: Collective Waste Solutions, a waste management company, acquired Fin-Wall Site Service, a provider of construction site services.
articleTitle: Collective Waste Solutions acquires Fin-Wall Site Services

title: Spearhead acted as a special advisor to Concentric Equity Partners on its acquisition of Collective Waste Solution and merger with Municipal Waste Management (MWM)
description: Spearhead advised Concentric Equity Partners on its acquisition of Collective Waste Solutions, a waste management company, and its merger with Municipal Waste Management (MWM), a municipal recycling and waste services provider.
articleTitle: Municipal Waste Management merges with Collective Waste Solutions

title: Spearhead acted as a special advisor to a Taubman Capital portfolio company (confidential)
description: Spearhead advised a portfolio company of Taubman Capital, on its tuck-in acquisition of a Southeast-based business services company. The parties and terms of the transaction were not disclosed.

title: Spearhead acted as a special advisor to a Taubman Capital portfolio company (confidential)
description: Spearhead advised a portfolio company of Taubman Capital on its tuck-in acquisition of a Pacific Northwest-based business services company. The parties and terms of the transaction were not disclosed.

title: Spearhead advised AWT Labels & Packaging, a portfolio company of Morgan Stanley Capital Partners, on its acquisition of American Label Technologies Inc.
description: AWT Labels & Packaging, a packaging and containers company and portfolio company of Morgan Stanley Capital Partners, acquired American Label Technologies Inc.
articleTitle: AWT Labels & Packaging Acquires American Label Technologies

title: Spearhead advised HostPapa on its acquisition of Brandpa
description: Canadian digital and cloud service provider, HostPapa, has acquired Brandpa, a AI-powered premium domain creation tool & marketplace based in the UK.
articleTitle: BrandPa, a AI-powered domain creation tool & marketplace, is acquired by HostPapa

title: Spearhead advised Creative Outdoor Advertising (COA), a street furniture advertising company, on its acquisition of Focus Media Group
description: Creative Outdoor Advertising, a street furniture advertising company based in Gormley, ON., owned by Fulcrum Capital Partners, acquired Focus Media Group Inc., which specializes in bench advertising in Southern California.

title: Spearhead advised Nutra Holdings, a health supplements company, on its minority investment in Brüst
description: Nutra Holdings, a rapidly expanding health and wellness company specializing in premium nutritional supplements and wellness solutions, made a minority investment in Brüst, a dynamic beverage company dedicated to crafting nutritious drinks for active lifestyles.

title: Spearhead advised The Chill Brothers, a Forum Asset Management company, on its acquisition of New Balance A/C Inc.
description: The Chill Brothers, based in Texas and specializing in residential HVAC services, acquired New Balance A/C Inc., a Houston firm offering residential and light commercial HVAC repair, replacement, design, and installation services.
articleTitle: The Chill Brothers Acquires Houston-based New Balance A/C

title: Spearhead advised Signers National, a technology-enabled insurance brokerage, on its acquisition of Affiliated Insurance Agents, LLC
description: Signers National, headquartered in New York and specializing in technology-enabled insurance brokerage services for nonprofits, health services, and commercial real estate, completed an acquisition of Houston-based Affiliated Insurance Agents, LLC, which delivers insurance solutions to religious institutions, childcare facilities, and nonprofit entities.
articleTitle: Signers National acquires Affiliated Insurance Agents, LLC

title: Spearhead advised First Onsite, a FirstService company, on its acquisition of DryPatrol LLC
description: First Onsite Property Restoration, a subsidiary of FirstService Corporation, one of North America's largest disaster recovery and restoration providers for commercial, institutional, and industrial businesses, has acquired DryPatrol LLC, a full-service commercial mitigation and reconstruction service provider based in Dayton, Ohio.
articleTitle: First Onsite Property Restoration Acquires DryPatrol LLC

title: Spearhead advised BV Investment Partners on its merger of Tomorrow Agency and HalfHelix
description: BV Investment Partners, a longstanding sector-focused private equity firm with over $5.0b invested in tech-enabled business services, software, and IT services, acquired Tomorrow Agency, a digital transformation partner serving the Shopify Plus ecosystem, and merged it with HalfHelix.
articleTitle: Tomorrow and Half Helix Announce Merger to Create Largest Independent Partner Serving Shopify Enterprise Brands

title: Spearhead advised Creative Outdoor Advertising, a Fulcrum Capital Partners company, on its acquisition of Sambrook Media Corp.
description: Creative Outdoor Advertising (COA), one of North America's largest advertising companies, acquired Sambrook Media Corporation. Sambrook Media Corporation has managed media space for municipalities including Transit Shelter advertising for over 30 years in the industry.

title: Spearhead advised HostPapa on its acquisition of Cloud 9 Hosting
description: HostPapa acquired Cloud 9, a US-based managed cloud hosting services company that brings critical accounting and tax applications into the cloud, enabling HostPapa to expand into the accounting and tax applications sector and broaden its customer base.

title: Spearhead advised Century Fire Protection, a FirstService company, on its acquisition of CSC Chesapeake Sprinkler Company
description: Century Fire Protection, a subsidiary of FirstService Corporation, one of North America's largest providers of essential property services, acquired CSC Chesapeake Sprinkler, a provider of fire protection solutions since 1978. Spearhead acted as the exclusive advisor to the buyer.
articleTitle: Century Fire Protection acquires CSC Chesapeake Sprinkler Company

title: Spearhead advised Urban Life Solutions, a Signal Hill Equity Partners company, in its acquisition of Forest Ridge Landscaping
description: Urban Life Solutions, a national provider of outdoor maintenance services, acquired Forest Ridge Landscaping, a family-owned Ontario business recognized for professional landscape construction and maintenance services. Spearhead provided exclusive advisory services to the buyer.
articleTitle: Urban Life Solutions Announces Acquisition of Forest Ridge Landscaping in the Greater Toronto Area

title: Spearhead advised American Pool, a FirstService company, on its acquisition of All Pool Service & Supply
description: FirstService American Pool, a subsidiary of FirstService Corporation, one of North America's largest providers of essential property services, acquired All Pool Service and Supply, Inc., a family-owned and operated company that provides efficient and reliable pool cleaning and remodeling services. Spearhead Corp Dev acted as the advisor to the buyer.
articleTitle: FirstService American Pool acquires All Pool Service
